textByHashes.515ef8ab2b6e58991aedc0d9c4c925aff8259db1: Welcome. Have you come to give your soul to the Chasm?
textByHashes.b1964ac2e651fa916ffd4370cf0b7fd958fb232e: You are not alone in that, but you will not find her here.
textByHashes.eccc73197dd72fff6de5b83135006ce3d1d49567: You are welcome to go in and check. You will find nothing. Sophia Hughes no longer has a place here.
textByHashes.96744415e57b938759d5d223522cc21ebd13c29a: Ah, there you are. Our master foresaw your arrival.
textByHashes.a05a9614c44c09d6c7587e325d012fa432ce6f9d: And you have the device as well. How wonderful.
textByHashes.7aa9ca294f36a614f90d5fa1f0ec523857ae1850: Oh look at you. You need a good rest. Here, have a lie down.
textByHashes.ff7d3f2ba13c71bba9647dec292ab515557bbd8d: For now. Have you came to prove yourself in combat against the many demons within the Chasm?
textByHashes.71dcc7f898816b899d1db83fe7db591ed2712e9f: My master prefers that his minions be killed with purpose.
textByHashes.7e0a3a9070fa3b1c27f056aa76a63c0ac87d9391: I ask no questions of my master, I just inform.
textByHashes.be57f9673de09fb8529227d34d7121aea7733957: I am not worthy to explain on his behalf. Descend the Chasm and speak with him yourself if you wish for further details.
textByHashes.8057b7f218faabfe5f8536e15bc90f09f821746b: As outlined in your contract, he wishes them slain in particular ways.
textByHashes.ce131f28809a236db87da31a19627dc6293dadcb: Death by two-handed melee weapons, heavy ranged weapons, magic spells, special attacks, and defeating them whilst bound.
textByHashes.5edc3fb121d48fd33780ecd4133fc16213ae17d4: Additionaly, he will request a specific method to be used. If you comply, your chances of obtaining a reward will be increased.
textByHashes.827c36515227488538ff45f406966a221ff52b06: Currently, my master wishes for you to use two handed melee weapons to kill his minions.
textByHashes.d0e5fc6988a90927a939153dae1874e921ca3709: Currently, my master wishes for you to use heavy ranged weapons to kill his minions.
textByHashes.0767baa5737cd030cd7edb85fa41fea10fb11fbb: Currently, my master wishes for you to use spells to kill his minions.
textByHashes.b3da0c0314d42b8747b79510d9325afad22113c1: Currently, my master wishes for you to use special attacks to kill his minions.
textByHashes.6cc581e8f3aceb7d39e8a4aec04d7ab1ac2d76d6: Special contracts, to be presented to my master for further discussion.
textByHashes.f57cbe007aec387189ee474a0ffc1a1f57bd1a3a: Oh yes! Just praying to my new master. It's hot down here, isn't it?
textByHashes.d844c8dd638d0b58dc9e7c70c58230fd00db0010: Yama! I sold my soul you see, well, I guess that Ox-headed guy down there forcibly removed it.
textByHashes.f8c5b673db98203b00ff415a7c464411efc4990f: Oh, don't worry, I'm perfectly fine with the outcome. Sure, the loss of vision is a shame but it could be worse.
textByHashes.021222dc4795745c929b30f51a7c0655c37f0c59: Underground there are no tall buildings, I'm awfully afraid of heights, you see.
textByHashes.3bbce71d538970b6409375c484997b992726126e: The ritual, there were some... adverse effects...
textByHashes.8b050f822f06779cabded7323a19aa6e6f87ab5f: Oh yes! Pretty basic really, head of an Ox, bruma roots, lots of fire and of course the human sacrifice.
textByHashes.b11ecdc2684c9c7a4e9e3998987eba546b3cc12b: The voice demanded that we stare into the fire until we saw enlightenment.
textByHashes.4cf1ad67e194aad90ebb18335fb1651f6d862089: Why, of course! We're Zamorakians, we're evil...
textByHashes.364113328b7e1f398e864cb83345fda92a727625: For now. Have you come to prove yourself in combat against the many demons within the Chasm?
textByHashes.225756b524e39ac7328319fbb69aadc2201b9f43: My master wishes you not to kill his minions without an agenda. You may only slay within the Chasm that which you have been assigned by a Slayer Master.
